name: tierless-repo
description: Workspace root for Tierless. The publishable packages live under packages/ (tierless, create-tierless); test/e2e/ and test/ prove the claims by importing the real package through its exports map.

scripts.build: npm run build -w tierless && npm run build -w create-tierless && tsc -p test/e2e/app/tsconfig.json
scripts.bench: node bench/overhead.mts && node bench/conduit.mts && node bench/wire.mts && node bench/delta.mts
